caption: Narendra Modi stands at a wooden lectern, delivering a speech against a textured, green marbled wall featuring geometric, recessed patterns. He is wearing a light beige traditional Indian outfit consisting of a long-sleeved tunic and a sleeveless Nehru jacket. Two microphones are positioned on the lectern in front of him. In the background, a gold-colored pillar is partially visible, adorned with a small cluster of pink flowers. Throughout the sequence, Modi maintains a consistent position, speaking with an open mouth and a focused expression. His gestures are minimal, with his hands resting near the edges of the lectern. The lighting is bright and even across the scene, and there are no on-screen texts, logos, or other people visible. The visual changes between frames are subtle, capturing slight shifts in his facial expression and the movement of his lips as he speaks.
